title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: OOB write in wasm::WellKnownImportsList::Update
bounty_rationale: report of V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
This bug is triggered by replacing one `Foreign` referencing a `NativeModule` with another one that uses the same tag. In a debug build, this triggers the assert shown below,
which eventually causes the OOB write ([code](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/
